activity: Abbas caught Cam playing with maps and ogma. He may be onto something

location: Town Hall Train Station, Sydney NSW 2000
activity: Arriving on the train, coffee in hand, looking suspiciously like someone who knows something you don't
Arrived at work. Unusually cheerful.
Third coffee. Still suspiciously cheerful.
Coding an easter egg for when he's out of office. You're looking at it.
Stress-eating chocolate. Denies it was stress. It was stress.

location: Sydney Central Plaza Food Court, Sydney NSW 2000
activity: Gone for lunch. Ordered something healthy. Ate something else.
Back from lunch. Suspiciously full for someone who ordered a salad.
Locking drawers and packing up. Colleagues circling his desk like vultures.
Setting the out-of-office. You know the one.

location: Town Hall Train Station, Sydney NSW 2000
activity: Heading home. Last confirmed sighting in the CBD for some time.
Arrived home. Greeted warmly. Immediately asked what's for dinner.
Working remotely. Joined a call for the Enrich product team. Wearing a shirt. Probably.
Handing over tasks to colleagues. Confidently describing things he will absolutely forget about.
Lunch at home. First of many.
OOO officially on. Laptop closed. Gone dark.
Washing clothes in preparation for holiday. Somehow still finding socks that don't match.
Playing at the park with the kids. Currently losing at some game the kinds invented the rules to.
Early night.

location: New Light Anglican Church, Riverstone NSW 2765
activity: At church. Genuinely at peace. Briefly.
Packing. Claims to be a light packer. Has four bags.
Repacking. Removed two bags. Added one larger bag.
Early night. Big drive tomorrow. Car is already packed incorrectly.
Up early. Coffee first. Always coffee first.
Driving to Port Macquarie.
Mandatory highway McDonald's stop. Not up for debate.
Arrived at Port Macquarie. Windows down. Ocean air confirmed.
